note: ⚠️ 这是 automation/marketing.mjs 自动生成的营销物料（示范）。发布前请人工抽查文案合规与品牌口径；接入发布/投放账户需人工授权。本项目以本地服务商家为目标客户，文案中涉及线索独家性、回报承诺等需结合实际履约能力人工核对，避免夸大宣传与监管风险。

landingCopy.hero: Exclusive, Ready-to-Buy Leads Delivered Straight to Your Phone
landingCopy.subhead: We rank #1 in your city for your service, then send every qualified call and form straight to you — no shared leads, no agencies, no long contracts. Pay only for leads that fit your business.
bullets: 100% exclusive: every lead is yours alone, never sold to 3 competitors like the big lead marketplaces do.
High-intent only: these are homeowners and clients actively searching 'plumber near me', 'roof repair', or 'dentist open now' — not cold lists.
Simple pricing that scales: $25–$80 per qualified lead, or a flat $500–$1,500/month for all the volume our ranking site produces.
Replace bad leads for free: if a call is spam, a wrong number, or out of your service area, we don't charge you.
No website, SEO, or ad budget needed on your end — we own the ranking asset and the risk.
landingCopy.cta: Claim Your City & Service — Book a 15-Min Call

faq.q: How is this different from HomeAdvisor, Thumbtack, or Angi?
faq.a: Those platforms sell the same lead to 3–5 contractors, so you're racing competitors on price. Our leads are 100% exclusive to you — when a prospect contacts our site, only your phone rings.

faq.q: What if a lead isn't a good fit?
faq.a: Spam calls, wrong numbers, robocalls, and out-of-area requests are never billed. We track every lead via call recording and form capture, so you only pay for real, qualified opportunities.

faq.q: Do I have to sign a long contract?
faq.a: No. Month-to-month. We earn your business with results every 30 days. Most clients stay because the leads close — but you're never locked in.

faq.q: How fast will I start getting leads?
faq.a: Our ranking site is often already live and producing calls in your market before we onboard you. In most cases you receive your first qualified leads within 7–14 days.

socialPosts.text: Most local service businesses pay for the SAME lead 4 other contractors are also chasing. That's not marketing — that's a bidding war. We rank a site #1 in your city and send you exclusive leads only. One search, one phone rings: yours.

Plumbers, roofers, lawyers, dentists: you don't have a sales problem. You have a 'where do new clients come from' problem. We rank #1 locally and hand you exclusive, ready-to-buy leads. Pay per lead or flat monthly.

Case in point: a roofing client was buying shared leads at $90 each and closing 1 in 12. We gave him EXCLUSIVE leads at $65. Close rate jumped to 1 in 4. Same spend, 3x the jobs. Exclusivity is the whole game.
Shared leads = 5 contractors calling the same homeowner in 60 seconds. Exclusive leads = your phone is the only one that rings. Which would you rather pay for?

We don't sell you ads. We don't sell you 'SEO services'. We own a site that already ranks #1 for your service in your city, and we route those high-intent calls straight to you. You only pay for leads that fit. The risk is on us.
$25–$80 per exclusive, high-intent lead. Or $500–$1,500/mo for all the volume. No setup fees. No long contracts. Spam and wrong-area leads are free. We replace what doesn't qualify.

Question for local service owners: how many leads do you LOSE because you were on a ladder, in a meeting, or in a patient's chair? Our system captures every call and form 24/7 so no high-intent prospect slips away.
Ranking takes months and a real budget. We've already done it for your service in your city. Instead of competing for the #1 spot, just rent the leads from it. First leads in 7–14 days.

We only work with ONE business per service, per city. Once a plumber claims your market, that exclusive lead flow is off the table for every competitor. If you want it locked to your phone, let's talk this week.
We give one plumber, one roofer, one lawyer per city the exclusive lead flow from a #1-ranked site. When your competitor claims it, you're locked out. DM 'CITY' to check if yours is still open.

emailSequence.subject: Your phone should ring before your competitor's does
emailSequence.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

Quick question: when a homeowner in {{City}} searches '{{Service}} near me' right now, whose phone rings?

If you buy leads from the big platforms, the answer is: yours AND four of your competitors'. You're all calling the same person, racing to the bottom on price.

We do it differently. We own a site that ranks #1 in {{City}} for {{Service}}, and we route every qualified call and form to ONE business — exclusively. No sharing. No bidding war.

Want to see if your city and service are still open? Reply 'OPEN' and I'll check.

— {{SenderName}}

emailSequence.subject: Why shared leads quietly kill your close rate
emailSequence.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

Here's the math nobody on the big lead platforms shows you:

A shared lead sold to 5 contractors converts at maybe 1 in 12. An exclusive lead — where you're the only call — closes at 1 in 3 to 1 in 4.

Same lead cost. Triple the jobs. The difference is exclusivity.

Our leads are 100% yours. When our #1-ranked {{City}} site captures a {{Service}} request, only your phone rings.

Want the numbers for your market? Reply and I'll send a quick breakdown.

— {{SenderName}}

emailSequence.subject: You never pay for spam or wrong-area calls
emailSequence.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

One worry I hear a lot: 'What if I pay for junk leads?'

Fair. So here's our rule: spam calls, robocalls, wrong numbers, and anyone outside your service area are NEVER billed. We track every lead with call recording and form capture, so you only pay for real, qualified opportunities.

Pricing is simple: $25–$80 per qualified lead, or a flat $500–$1,500/month for all the volume our site produces. Month-to-month. No setup fee.

Want to lock in {{City}}? Reply 'YES'.

— {{SenderName}}

emailSequence.subject: How a {{City}} roofer 3x'd his booked jobs
emailSequence.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

A roofer in a market like yours was paying ~$90/lead on a shared platform and closing about 1 in 12. He switched to our exclusive leads at $65 each.

His close rate jumped to roughly 1 in 4. Same monthly spend — three times the jobs booked. The only variable that changed was exclusivity.

We've already built and ranked the asset for {{Service}} in {{City}}. You don't pay for SEO, ads, or a website. You just get the leads it produces.

Ready to be the only {{Service}} business on it? Reply and let's grab 15 minutes.

— {{SenderName}}

emailSequence.subject: Last note — {{City}} {{Service}} is one slot only
emailSequence.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

Final note from me. We give the exclusive lead flow from our #1-ranked {{City}} site to ONE {{Service}} business — and right now that slot is still open.

The moment a competitor claims it, that flow is locked to their phone and off the table for everyone else in {{City}}.

No long contract, month-to-month, junk leads free, first leads usually in 7–14 days. The risk is on us.

If you want it, just reply 'CLAIM' and I'll send the booking link. If now's not the time, no worries — I'll close the file.

— {{SenderName}}
